title: Sanity Level
description: A Fabric mod that introduces the concept of sanity to Minecraft.
body:
# Sanity-Level-MOD A Fabric mod that introduces the concept of sanity to Minecraft. 正気度の概念をマイクラに導入するFabric用Mod --- ## Overview This mod introduces a Sanity (Mental Health) system to Minecraft, adding a sanity gauge and various items to manage your mental state. ### Mechanics - **Sanity Levels** - **Decrease**: Staying in dark areas, hostile dimensions/biomes, or being near monsters. - **Recovery**: Staying in peaceful biomes (e.g., Plains), being in sunlight, or staying near tamed pets (Dogs, Cats). - **Penalties** As Sanity drops, players experience: - Visual distortions (Monochrome shaders, noise) - Auditory hallucinations (Ghostly sounds) - Involuntary item dropping - Taking continuous damage when Sanity reaches 0. --- ## Featured Items - **Caramel**: Restores 1 Hunger point.
- **Milk Caramel**: Eating it slightly restores both Sanity and Hunger, granting a brief "Calm" effect.
- **Knot of Serenity**: A powerful eitem that negates all Sanity loss while held in the inventory.

- **Potion of Sanity**: Provides the "Calm" effect. Brewed with Glowstone Dust and Awkward Potion. ・Strange Potion + Brewing with Glowstone, extended with Redstone --- ## 日本語概要 (Japanese Overview) プレイヤーに正気度ゲージ、調整用アイテムが複数追加されます。 ### 特徴 - **正気度**: 暗闇や敵モブの近くなどで減少し、日光やテイム済みモブの近くで回復します。 - **ペナルティ**: 減少に伴い、視界の悪化（モノクロ化・ノイズ）、幻聴、アイテムの自動ドロップが発生し、0になるとダメージを受けます。 ### アイテム - **キャラメル / ミルクキャラメル**: 満腹度や正気度を回復します。 - **安寧の結び目**: 所持している間、正気度の減少を完全に無効化するアイテムです。 - **精神安定のポーション**: 冷静エフェクトを付与します。 ・奇妙なポーション+グロウストーンで醸造、レッドストーンで延長 --- ## Environment & Credits - **Platform**: Fabric Loader - **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.1 - **License**: [MIT](LICENSE) - **Developed by**: kyonshi ## Dependencies (前提Mod) [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) : Required for the mod to function. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): Optional(recommended for changing settings in-game) *Note: This description was translated from Japanese using translation tools. We apologize for any unnatural expressions.*
